document_id: 6.人工知能関連技術の研究開発及び活用の推進に関する法律.html
category:
Category: Trade

Explanation: This appears to be Japan's AI Technology Development and Utilization Promotion Act, which primarily focuses on promoting research, development and commercial utilization of AI technologies. The law establishes frameworks for AI technology development and its implementation in business and trade activities.

extracted_info.title: Act on Promotion of Research and Development and Utilization of Artificial Intelligence-Related Technologies
extracted_info.regulatory_body: AI Strategy Headquarters (人工知能戦略本部)
extracted_info.scope: Research, development and utilization of AI-related technologies in Japan
key_requirements: Ensuring transparency in AI development and utilization
Development of guidelines aligned with international norms
Infrastructure development for AI research and development
Human resource development in AI field

key_requirement_details.requirement: Creation and implementation of AI Basic Plan
key_requirement_details.compliance_action: Government must establish and publish comprehensive AI basic plan

key_requirement_details.requirement: Ensuring proper use and prevention of misuse of AI technologies
key_requirement_details.compliance_action: Implement measures to ensure transparency in AI development and utilization

phased_milestones: General provisions effective immediately upon publication
Chapters 3 and 4 effective within 3 months of publication

notes: Law establishes framework for AI development and utilization rather than specific regulatory requirements
Emphasizes cooperation between government, research institutions, and private sector
Focus on promoting AI development while ensuring appropriate safeguards
